title: My letter to Anno Hideaki san
display_title: My letter to Anno Hideaki san
wikitext:
[]: My letter to Anno Hideaki-san             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu May 16, 2013 7:49 pm The Letter  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu May 16, 2013 9:38 pm Well keep us posted, appreciate the share.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 16, 2013 9:58 pm I'm pessimistic about you getting a direct response, however I appreciate the spirit of what you're doing, and I'd like to see if anything comes of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu May 16, 2013 11:32 pm Did you write the letter in Japanese? I'm just not sure how good Anno's English is. He might not be able to understand it. I see a few different scenarios: 1)Return to sender. 2)Letter received, but tossed aside and forgotten. 3)Letter received, opened, but not being in native Japanese, it is auto-tossed. 4)Letter received, opened, translated, but no response sent back. 5)Letter received, opened, translated, and responded to by a staff member. 6)Letter received, opened, translated, and responded to by Anno. That being said, if this letter is responded to by Anno himself, it'll be the most monumental thing to happen to an evageeks member. Pulling for ya.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu May 16, 2013 11:50 pm I hope you get the response.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri May 17, 2013 4:52 am At first I was like "Oh, this is really nice" but then got to the questions and it got a little awkward. Especially as one or two are a little pedestrian, or we have enough material to work with to establish answers, i.e. Quantum Rei. My advice would be to withhold any questions you have for the reply, if you do possibly get one (Or maybe just whittle a few out for the time being... I don't know) - But yeah, otherwise; go for it Nuke! Nothing to lose, hey. In this day and age actual fan mail is pretty much extinct, even with more mediums such as email and the internet, it's just not something you tend to know or hear about all that often. And the receiver will always appreciate the heartfelt sentiment and expression too. Keep us posted, man! ;)

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Fri May 17, 2013 4:55 am I'ma send him a death threat so it gets into 4.0

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Fri May 17, 2013 8:21 am You do realize, Nuke-kun, that this means war, right? You sent him a letter. If I am to best you, I'll have to go visit the man. That said, the letter is excellent. It's the right length to not be a bore to read, but expository enough to get the details in that you requires. Good job!

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Fri May 17, 2013 8:50 am Nukey, that fine letter coupled with your beard makes me very happy, and proud, of you.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri May 17, 2013 9:09 am Cool, I like what you did there

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri May 17, 2013 11:13 am I agree with Blue Monday: the questions at the end sound like something Anno/Gainax get a lot. Since they've kept quiet about this stuff for so long, I doubt they'll feel inclined to give you any answers. At least not until 4.0 is out.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 17, 2013 1:28 pm If he responds to you, you are God. And I will send him something too. Also, let´s send him death threads. Seriously. Think about it. Your letter in Eva 4.0. Awesome. And Anno doesn´t speak any english. He said he regreted not having paid attention in school. Or did you write it in Japanese?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri May 17, 2013 1:54 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Also, let´s send him death threads. Seriously. Think about it. Your letter in Eva 4.0. Awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 17, 2013 3:04 pm There were some letters of praise in EoE as well...

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri May 17, 2013 3:22 pm AI KEEL YUU ANNOOOU

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri May 17, 2013 3:23 pm I'm surprised at the amount of people that have taken an interest in this! Now, I really am not expecting a response back. I understand that it's only a fan letter, and that there is no obligation to reply. Sending the letter was mainly done for the spirit of the thing. It's going to depart from a West Coast post office this Saturday, so I'll keep you posted once I get it out of my house. Now, to answer your questions! @ Guy nacks The letter is in English. My Japanese is not good enough to write a letter. Regardless of if Anno can understand it or not, there is probably at least one person in the Khara building that knows English and can translate. @ Blue Monday and Riffraff I would have never forgiven myself if Anno had responded and I hadn't at least asked some of the biggest questions. @ Everybody else who took the time to respond to this thread Thank you all for your support! If I get a response, believe me, you guys will be the first to know.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri May 17, 2013 3:25 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: @ Everybody else who took the time to respond to this thread Thank you all for your support!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri May 17, 2013 3:28 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: What's the worst that could happen, seriously now

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 17, 2013 3:58 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Well, first of all: *threats. Second: I really, really , REALLY hope you're joking. Even then, that's a very bad joke. For many reasons that I shouldn't need to enumerate.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Fri May 17, 2013 4:10 pm It was in highly poor taste, is what i think he meant.
